description: Trigger a Dagster job when a Precisely Connect job run completes.

job_id.label: Job ID
job_id.description: Precisely Connect ETL job ID (use with list-runs mode).

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Dagster job to trigger when Precisely run completes

host_env_var.label: Host Env Var
host_env_var.description: Env var with Precisely Connect host URL

api_token_env_var.label: Api Token Env Var
api_token_env_var.description: Env var with Precisely API token

job_run_id.label: Job Run ID
job_run_id.description: Specific job-run ID to watch. Uses verified Job Status endpoint.

list_runs_path_template.label: List Runs Path Template
list_runs_path_template.description: Path template for listing recent runs. Validate vs your install (not in Precisely's public REST docs).

name: Precisely Job Sensor
